title: Action Sheet Content Type
description: Type definition for custom content that can be displayed in an action sheet. This type allows for either a template reference or a component type to be used as custom content.

sections.title: Type Definition
sections.description: A union type that can be either a TemplateRef for custom templates or a ComponentType for custom components.

props.name: AXActionSheetContentType
props.description: Union type allowing a TemplateRef or a ComponentType for custom action sheet content.
